news.title: Hina Khan thanks bestie Rubina Dilaik for sending mangoes & ghee from Himachal
news.description: Television superstar Hina Khan was recently in for a surprise as bestie and television superstar Rubina Dilaik sent her fresh mangoes and home-made ghee straight from Himachal Pradesh.
